events.name: Family Fun Zone Pre-Sale Wristbands
events.summary: $10 weekend wristbands available all week at Styles on Main Salon and Boutique — discounted from full price.
events.description: Stop into Styles on Main Salon and Boutique to grab Family Fun Zone wristbands for a discounted price of $10 for the whole Nabor Days weekend! Store hours: Monday 9am–5pm, Tuesday 9am–8pm, Thursday 9am–7pm, Friday 9am–5pm.

location.name: Styles on Main Salon and Boutique

events.name: Royalty Crowning & Grand Marshal Presentation
events.summary: Royalty send-off, new royalty crowning, and Grand Marshal presentation. Everyone welcome. FREE admission.
events.description: Join us for the 2025 Cadott Royalty send-off, 2026 Cadott Royalty crowning, and the Grand Marshal presentation. Everyone is welcome! Raffle ticket drawing winners will also be announced — no need to be present to win. Held in the Cadott High School Auditorium. FREE admission.

events.name: Truck & Tractor Pull
events.summary: Friday-night Mid-State Pullers action at Riverview Park East. Gates and registration open at 5 PM, drivers meeting 6:30, first pull at 7 PM.
events.description:
Cadott Nabor Days Truck & Tractor Pull — Friday, July 24, 2026 at Riverview Park, east side of Hwy 27. Gates and registration open at 4 PM, drivers meeting at 6:30 PM, first pull at 7 PM. Food and beverages available on the grounds. Limited seating — please bring lawn chairs.

Pulling Classes: 8000# LTD Pro; 6200# Superstock 4x4 Trucks; 8000# 2.6 Diesel 4x4 Trucks; 6500# Light Super Stocks; 6200# Street Altered Gas Trucks; 11000# 12 MPH Altered Farm Tractor; 6200# Hot Farm; King of the Street; Street Stock 4x4; Hot Stock Diesel.

Admission: Adults 15+ $15, Kids 6–14 $10, Children 5 & under FREE. Drivers: see Mid-State Pullers website for class rules. Sled: Track Patrol Red. Mid-State payouts for all Mid-State classes. Event promoter: Steve Green (Mid-State) — 715-305-7177.

events.name: Friday Bean Bag Tournament
events.summary: Open-to-all bean bag tournament at the beer tent. Registration 5–5:45 PM, start at 6 PM. $20 entry per team, 100% payback.
events.description: Registration 5:00–5:45 PM. Start time 6:00 PM. Held at the beer tent on the west side of Riverview Park. Teams of 2 — random draw for partners. $20 entry, 100% payback. Best 2-of-3. No bust. Bags and boards provided by the Cadott Community Association.

events.name: Another Road — Live at the Beer Tent
events.summary: Friday-night live music with Another Road. No cover charge to listen. Must be 21+ to enter the beer tent.
events.description: We're excited to welcome the band Another Road back to Nabor Days! Come out and enjoy great music, dancing, and ice-cold beverages. No entry fee to listen. Must be 21+ to enter the beer tent. Riverview Park, off Hwy 27.

events.name: Nabor Days Vendor Market
events.summary: Farmers market and vendor fair at Riverview Park, Saturday 9 AM–3 PM. Vendor booths $20 per 10'x10' space — sign up by July 20.
events.description:
Shop local at the Nabor Days Vendor Market — a farmers market and vendor event at Riverview Park on Saturday, July 25 from 9 AM to 3 PM (some vendors may stay open until 6 PM).

Want a booth? Spaces are $20 per 10' x 10' booth — FREE for existing Cadott farmers market vendors. Setup begins at 8 AM. No power is available. Booth fees are collected in cash on the day of the event — we never ask for payment online in advance, so please be aware of scammers.

Sign up by Monday, July 20. Late registrations are accepted if space allows. Questions: contact Cory LaNou at 715-313-0145 or cory@lanou.com.

events.name: Dart Tournament
events.summary: Chicago-style dart tournament at the beer tent. Registration 11:30 AM, noon start. $10 entry, 100% payback plus money added.
events.description: Join us for the annual Cadott Nabor Days Dart Tournament. Chicago style — race to 3 winners, race to 2 losers. Registration 11:30 AM, noon start. $10 entry fee. Held at the Riverview Park beer tent. 100% payback plus money added. Co-hosted by Cadott Nabor Days and DJ Schnitcke.

events.name: Firemans Mud Bog
events.summary: New 2 PM start time this year. Six MMA mud-drag classes — STREET, OPEN STREET, SUPER, PRO, MODIFIED, OPEN. Bring lawn chairs.
events.description:
The annual Firemans Mud Bog returns to East Riverview Park. New earlier 2:00 PM start time this year. Limited seating — please bring lawn chairs.

The Midwest Motorsports Association formula is simple: take conventional drag racing off the asphalt and run it through 150 feet of the most premium local sludge available. Lights and electronic timing traps just like NHRA — the difference is the racing surface. Six classes of MMA Mud Drags: STREET, OPEN STREET, SUPER, PRO, MODIFIED, and OPEN. Top finishers get cash, trophies, and awards.

Admission: Adults $15, Kids 6–12 $10, Kids 5 & under FREE. Drivers: registration starts at noon, entry $30 per run with 75% payback. Questions: contact Mike at 1-608-385-2894.

events.name: The Man2Man Band with Margie-Ann
events.summary: Saturday-afternoon live music with Margie-Ann. FREE event at Riverview Park.
events.description: We're excited to welcome back The Man2Man Band with Margie-Ann this year! Join us for an afternoon of great music, dancing, and ice-cold beverages. FREE event. Riverview Park, off Hwy 27.

events.name: The Cragars — Saturday Night Headliner
events.summary: Saturday-night dance music with The Cragars. FREE event, plays through and after the fireworks.
events.description: The Cragars are back at Nabor Days for 2026! Come out and enjoy great music, dancing, and ice-cold beverages. Plays straight through Saturday evening — the band keeps going during and after the fireworks. FREE event. Riverview Park, off Hwy 27.

events.name: Nabor Days Fireworks
events.summary: Saturday-night family tradition. Lit at 9:30 PM at the East Park area by Crestwood Corners Fireworks. FREE.
events.description: It wouldn't be Nabor Days without Saturday-night fireworks! Enjoy this family tradition for what is sure to be a spectacular show. Fireworks will be lit shortly after dusk — around 9:30 PM at the East Park area — by Crestwood Corners Fireworks. FREE.

events.name: 72nd Annual Nabor Days Parade
events.summary: NEW START TIME: NOON. 2026 theme is Stars, Stripes & Small-Town Pride for the USA 250th anniversary. Pre-register by July 18.
events.description:
Join us for the 72nd Annual Cadott Nabor Days Parade! One of the community's favorite traditions — local businesses, community clubs, police and fire departments, the Grand Marshal(s), the royalty court, and so much more.

New start time for 2026: NOON. Plan accordingly.

2026 Theme — Stars, Stripes & Small-Town Pride: In honor of the United States celebrating its 250th anniversary, this year's parade features a patriotic theme. Dress in your patriotic attire whether you're in the parade or just watching!

Parade route: starts at the corner of Hwy X (Chippewa Street) and Main Street, proceeds north on Main Street, and concludes at the intersection of N Main Street and E Mills Street.

Want to be in the parade? Pre-register online by July 18, 2026 — use the registration link on this page. Invitations and registration forms have also been mailed. Questions: contact Ashley Anderson-Pozarski at cadottchirodc@gmail.com or 715-978-0600.

events.name: Sunday Bean Bag Tournament — Locals Only
events.summary: Locals-only (20-mile radius) bean bag tournament after the parade. Registration 2 PM, tournament starts 2:30. $20 per team, 100% payback.
events.description:
Join us for a locals-only bean bag tournament Sunday after the parade. Registration starts at 2:00 PM at the beer tent on the west side of Riverview Park, with the tournament beginning at 2:30 PM. Teams of 2, random draw. $20 entry per team. 100% payback. Best 2-of-3. No bust. Bags and boards provided by the Cadott Community Association.

"Locals only" means players must reside within a 20-mile radius of Cadott.
